market.advice: Confirmed uptrend, breadth 66% above MA50, VIX 18.1 (calm but ticking up from 18.0 5-day avg). SPY above MA50; only 2 distribution days — the structure is intact. The dominant theme is financials and industrials leading via tight VCP breakouts — many within 1-3% of 52-week highs with RS lines at new highs. Add to clean setups on volume; standard position sizing; avoid chasing RSI >73 names.
